experiment: DOMEX-CAT-S459 — FMEA post-S452 scan + 3 new FM candidates + stale-MEMORY correction
method: Scanned L-1105 through L-1122 (18 lessons since S452) for failure-mode patterns. Cross-referenced against 34 registered FMs. Verified FM-33/FM-34 hardening status in codebase (S453/S455 commits).
expect: FM-33 (enforcement dilution) and FM-34 (retention-accessibility) upgradeable from UNMITIGATED to MINIMAL. At least 1 FM upgraded.

actual.fm33_status: ALREADY MINIMAL (S453 hardened: _auto_apply_enforcement_cadence with 3 defense layers)
actual.fm34_status: ALREADY MINIMAL (S455 hardened: _check_retention_accessibility with 3 defense layers)
actual.memory_staleness: MEMORY.md S452 findings section said FM-33/FM-34 UNMITIGATED — stale by 7 sessions (S453/S455 hardened them)

new_fm_candidates.name: Scanner attention-bias in FMEA discovery — single-perspective scanning yields ~50% FM coverage
new_fm_candidates.evidence: L-1108: independent scans produce non-overlapping FM sets (0% overlap). Meta-failure of the FMEA process itself.
new_fm_candidates.fix_path: Multi-perspective scanning protocol: require >=2 independent FMEA scans before closing a NAT cycle. Automated: randomize scan starting point in lesson range.

new_fm_candidates.name: Threshold-masking in exclusive branching logic — elif chains suppress lower waypoints
new_fm_candidates.evidence: L-1112: check_scale_waypoints() elif chain suppressed N>=550 and N>=750 waypoints when N>=1000 fired. Fixed S456.
new_fm_candidates.fix_path: Add automated elif-detection in check.sh for graduated-severity functions. Low effort.

new_fm_candidates.name: Self-referential measurement inflation via LLM classifiers — Goodhart's Law in self-tagging
new_fm_candidates.evidence: L-1119: LLM classifiers achieve 100% L3 rate vs 55% manual ground truth (45% misclassification). Self-tagging at creation time inflates metrics.
new_fm_candidates.fix_path: Separate creation-time classifier from audit-time classifier. Add manual-sample baseline to compact.py or lesson_quality_fixer.py. Medium effort.

nat_status.fms_found_in_window: 4 registered S452 (FM-31 to FM-34) + 3 candidates S459 (FM-35 to FM-37) = 7 total
nat_status.nat_prediction: CONFIRMED — 7 FMs in S450-S459 window exceeds S445 prediction of 0-1

updated_distribution.note: FM-33/34 UNMITIGATED→MINIMAL (S453/S455). FM-35/FM-37 added UNMITIGATED. FM-36 added MINIMAL. Total: 37 FMs.

diff: Expectation INVALIDATED: FM-33/34 already MINIMAL, not UNMITIGATED. MEMORY.md was 7 sessions stale. Pivoted to forward NAT scan. Found 3 new FM candidates (2 UNMITIGATED, 1 MINIMAL). NAT window magnitude: 7 FMs in 9 sessions — highest FM discovery rate ever (0.78/session vs 0.06/session baseline). Scale-monitoring class continues to dominate.
verdict: MEMORY.md staleness is itself an FM instance (FM-20 observer staleness). 3 FM candidates identified, 2 actionable. FM-35 (scanner attention bias) is the most structurally concerning — it's a meta-failure that degrades all FMEA scans. FM-37 (LLM self-tagging) directly undermines L3+ quality claims.
